MSD Capital, LP (Profit share) (private investment company) (value not readily ascertainable).

MSD Capital, LP places 2.5% of the firm’s net profits into a “Partners Profit Pool”. Net profits were calculated based on excess management fees plus realized profits on underlying investments. The filer is entitled to between 25% and 36% of the “Partners Profit Pool”. The filer is only entitled to “Partners Profit Pool” amounts on investments made before he left the firm in June 2022. He is not entitled to any new investments made by MSD Capital, LP. Value not ascertainable because timing and amount of profit is unknown. All underlying investments are included in Part 2, Line 8, 10, 12, 14, and 16 and Part 6, Line 34.3 and 66.
